comment: This is generated by ESQL's AbstractFunctionTestCase. Do not edit it. See ../README.md for how to regenerate it.
name: embedding
description: Generates dense vector embeddings from multimodal input using a specified inference endpoint with the {@code embedding} task type. Use this function to generate query vectors for KNN searches from multimodal inputs against your vectorized data or other dense vector based operations.

params.name: value
params.description: Value to generate embeddings from. Must be a non-null literal string value.

params.name: inference_id
params.description: Identifier of an existing inference endpoint that will generate the embeddings. The inference endpoint must have the `embedding` task type and should use the same model that was used to embed your indexed data.

params.name: value
params.description: Value to generate embeddings from. Must be a non-null literal string value.

params.name: inference_id
params.description: Identifier of an existing inference endpoint that will generate the embeddings. The inference endpoint must have the `embedding` task type and should use the same model that was used to embed your indexed data.

params.name: options
params.mapParams: {name='type', values=[], description='Content type of the input (e.g. "text", "image").', type=[keyword]}, {name='format', values=[], description='Format of the input content (e.g. "text", "base64").', type=[keyword]}, {name='timeout', values=[], description='Timeout for the inference request (e.g. "30s", "1m").', type=[keyword]}

examples:
FROM dense_vector_text METADATA _score
| EVAL query_embedding = EMBEDDING("be excellent to each other", "test_embedding_inference")
| WHERE KNN(text_embedding_field, query_embedding)

ROW b64_input="Who is Victor Hugo?"
| EVAL embedding = EMBEDDING("V2hvIGlzIFZpY3RvciBIdWdvPw==", "test_embedding_inference", {"type": "image", "format": "base64"})
